title: After the Mile Championship: High-Key Happy

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Aghhh! I lost! This high-key sucks!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: No cap! It's time for my glow-up arc!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Let's run it back after I nail my rainbow
breakaway!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Definitely! I'd love to run with you again!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hehe! For real though, thanks for the run, bestie!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wow! I'm so glad I got to run with Helios today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
She had so much energy. And not just in the
paddock, but at the gate and during the race too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I think some of it even rubbed off on me. She's
really something else, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, speak of the devil! It's Helios!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
She says she's "gonna go feast mode to cheer
herself up..." and I'm invited!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I totally wanna go! I'm saying yes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, wait, but I'm the one who won...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Helios's snack party must have been a lot of fun
because Matikanetannhauser tells me all about it
the next day.
